posts.author: Paulosilva (Paulo Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I need help!
The “Start Zoom Call” button has disappeared on the board and I can’t seem to make it appear again. I already tried the option “Hide Zoom Call Buttom” in an attempt to reverse the situation but it didn’t work. If anyone can help me thank you.

posts.author: maprinci (Michael Princi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have just migrated from webex to Zoom and would like to re-enable this feature too. Any help would be appreciated.

Thanks.
